case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $194.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-06-2003
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-21-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ROGER GUERTIN RE: COPIES IN LEIU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION ON DEFENDANT FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED OCT-29-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC.
DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOTO ENTERPRISES, INC. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $9,206.27 DAMAGES, $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $294.88 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,751.15, COST INCLUDES $100.88 INTEREST; PROPERTY VALUE IS $1,500.
